description: §41.15.4 (a) compile-time misuse — a single schemaFor(...) call supplies BOTH `pick` AND `omit` options. The two transforms are mutually exclusive (pick names the only fields to render; omit names fields to exclude — the inverse), so co-occurrence on one call is rejected with E-SCHEMAFOR-PICK-OMIT-CONFLICT.
rationale: §41.15.4 normative statement: `pick` and `omit` SHALL NOT be combined on the same schemaFor(...) call; co-occurrence is E-SCHEMAFOR-PICK-OMIT-CONFLICT (§34). Resolution: choose one; if both are truly needed, layer a Pick over an Omit at the type level and pass the derived type.
